introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu barayaa goobaha iyo dadka waxbarashada, maadooyinka, agabka fasalka, study habits, awoodda, Present Perfect-ka hordhaca ah, participles, ever/never, already/yet/just, Past Simple, for/since, jadwallo, notices iyo qoraallo waxbarasho.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Goobaha waxbarashada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples waxbarasho oo dabiici ah, iyo mock education data.
learningObjectives: Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Nidaamyada waxbarashadu dalalka way ku kala duwanaan karaan; erayadan waxaa loo baranayaa macne guud. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Nidaamyada waxbarashadu dalalka way ku kala duwanaan karaan; erayadan waxaa loo baranayaa macne guud.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Goobaha waxbarashada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The school offers morning classes and a small library for its students.
lines.somali: Dugsigu wuxuu ardaydiisa siiyaa fasallo subax iyo maktabad yar.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Goobaha waxbarashada: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The primary school uses pictures and short activities with younger pupils.
lines.somali: Dugsiga hoose wuxuu ardayda yaryar la isticmaalaa sawirro iyo hawlo gaagaaban.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Pupil badanaa waa arday yar; student waa eray guud; tutor wuxuu taageeraa qof ama koox yar. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Pupil badanaa waa arday yar; student waa eray guud; tutor wuxuu taageeraa qof ama koox yar.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dadka waxbarashada ku jira: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The student submitted her writing assignment before Friday’s deadline.
lines.somali: Ardaydu waxay layligeeda qoraalka gudbisay ka hor waqtiga Jimcaha.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Each pupil chose a short book from the classroom shelf.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.

lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Subject waa maado; course waa casharro badan oo mawduuc ama xirfad lagu barto. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Subject waa maado; course waa casharro badan oo mawduuc ama xirfad lagu barto.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The timetable includes mathematics twice this week.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.

grammar.explanationSomali: Agabka fasalka waxaa lagu isticmaalaa collocations sida use a dictionary, complete a worksheet iyo save an online resource. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Agabka fasalka waxaa lagu isticmaalaa collocations sida use a dictionary, complete a worksheet iyo save an online resource.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Alaabta iyo agabka fasalka: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The class opened the textbook to the unit about travel.
lines.somali: Fasalku wuxuu buugga casharka ka furay unit-ka safarka.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Alaabta iyo agabka fasalka: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I keep new vocabulary and example sentences in one notebook.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Classroom imperatives waxay isticmaalaan base verb; polite requests waxay ku dari karaan please. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Classroom imperatives waxay isticmaalaan base verb; polite requests waxay ku dari karaan please.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Please + base verb / imperative + classroom object.

positiveExamples.english: The teacher asked the class to read the short passage.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hawlaha fasalka: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The teacher asked the class to read the short passage.
lines.somali: Macallinku wuxuu fasalka ka codsaday inay akhri hawsha casharka ee ku habboon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hawlaha fasalka: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The teacher asked the class to write three example sentences.
lines.somali: Macallinku wuxuu fasalka ka codsaday inay qor hawsha casharka ee ku habboon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee teacher–student role-play ku saabsan Hawlaha fasalka. Isticmaal arday, koorso iyo jadwal tusaale ah; ha bixin xog dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama education message ku saabsan Hawlaha fasalka, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mock ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Hawlaha fasalka, vocabulary muhiim ah, grammar-ka A2 iyo sida education context loogu isticmaalo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Asking for Help in Class grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Can iyo could waxaa loo isticmaalaa codsi; could waa ka edeb badan yahay. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Can iyo could waxaa loo isticmaalaa codsi; could waa ka edeb badan yahay.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Caawimo weydiisashada fasalka: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The student used “I don’t understand this question.” while asking for help politely.
lines.somali: Ardaygu wuxuu “Su’aashan ma fahmin.” u adeegsaday markii uu caawimo si edeb leh u codsanayay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: During the lesson, the student asked, “Could you explain it again?”

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Caawimo weydiisashada fasalka, vocabulary muhiim ah, grammar-ka A2 iyo sida education context loogu isticmaalo.

grammar.explanationSomali: Homework waa uncountable; ha oran homeworks. Assignment waa hawl gaar ah oo la qiimeyn karo. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Homework waa uncountable; ha oran homeworks. Assignment waa hawl gaar ah oo la qiimeyn karo.

positiveExamples.english: Our teacher gave us homework that we must complete before Thursday.

positiveExamples.english: Our teacher gave us a writing assignment that we must complete by Thursday.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?

lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?

grammar.explanationSomali: Take/sit/pass/fail an exam waa collocations; make an exam looma isticmaalo ardayga imtixaanka qaadanaya. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Take/sit/pass/fail an exam waa collocations; make an exam looma isticmaalo ardayga imtixaanka qaadanaya.

positiveExamples.english: The short test checks vocabulary from the last two lessons.

positiveExamples.english: The teacher marked our quizzes and explained every incorrect answer.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The short test checks vocabulary from the last two lessons.

lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Ardaygu wuxuu khaladaadka wax ka baro inta lagu jiro fadhi waxbarasho oo soddon daqiiqo ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Topic: Caadooyinka waxbarashada. Common collocation-ka waxaa lagu muujiyay example-ka waxbarasho ee dabiiciga ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Kala saar erayada isu dhow adigoo eegaya education context-ka.

grammar.explanationSomali: Study waa dadaalka waxbarasho; learn waa aqoonta la kasbado; practise waa ku celcelin xirfad. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Study waa dadaalka waxbarasho; learn waa aqoonta la kasbado; practise waa ku celcelin xirfad.

positiveExamples.english: I study English for thirty minutes after dinner on weekdays.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan English bartaa soddon daqiiqo qadada habeen kadib maalmaha shaqada.

positiveExamples.english: I am going to revise the grammar lessons before Monday’s exam.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan dib u eegayaa casharrada naxwaha kahor imtixaanka Isniinta.

positiveExamples.english: We review new vocabulary at the end of every study session.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan erayada cusub dib u eegnaa dhammaadka fadhi kasta oo waxbarasho.

positiveExamples.english: The students practise speaking in pairs for ten minutes every evening.
positiveExamples.somali: Ardaydu waxay laba-laba ugu tababartaan hadalka toban daqiiqo fiid kasta.

positiveExamples.english: She uses short examples to memorize the irregular verb forms.

positiveExamples.english: I remember new vocabulary better when I use it in my own sentences.

negativeExamples.english: I haven’t finished the assignment yet.
negativeExamples.somali: Weli ma dhammaystirin layliga.

negativeExamples.english: She could not use the online classroom last year.
negativeExamples.somali: Sannadkii hore ma isticmaali karin fasalka online-ka.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Caadooyinka waxbarashada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I study English for thirty minutes after dinner on weekdays.
lines.somali: Waxaan English bartaa soddon daqiiqo qadada habeen kadib maalmaha shaqada.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Caadooyinka waxbarashada: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I am going to revise the grammar lessons before Monday’s exam.
lines.somali: Waxaan dib u eegayaa casharrada naxwaha kahor imtixaanka Isniinta.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Hababka qofku wax u barto.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

grammar.explanationSomali: Can/can’t waa awood hadda; could/couldn’t waa awood hore; be able to waxaa loo isticmaali karaa waqtiyo kala duwan. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Can/can’t waa awood hadda; could/couldn’t waa awood hore; be able to waxaa loo isticmaali karaa waqtiyo kala duwan.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + can/could + base / be + able to + base.

lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I can read short English texts without using a dictionary.
lines.somali: Waxaan akhrin karaa qoraallo English oo gaagaaban anigoon qaamuus isticmaalin.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka awoodda waxbarasho: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: She can explain the grammar answer with a clear example.
lines.somali: Waxay jawaabta naxwaha ku sharxi kartaa tusaale cad.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Horumarka iyo waxyaabaha adag waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples waxbarasho oo dabiici ah, iyo mock education data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Horumarka iyo waxyaabaha adag.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Progress waa isbeddelka horumarka; result waa natiijo hal imtixaan ama hawl. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Progress waa isbeddelka horumarka; result waa natiijo hal imtixaan ama hawl.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

grammar.titleEnglish: Introduction to the Present Perfect grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Present Perfect qaabkiisu waa have/has + past participle; casharku wuxuu bixinayaa hordhac keliya. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Present Perfect qaabkiisu waa have/has + past participle; casharku wuxuu bixinayaa hordhac keliya.
grammar.sentenceStructure: I/you/we/they + have; he/she/it + has + past participle.

positiveExamples.english: I have finished my homework, so I can review the next lesson.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan dhammaystiray shaqo-gurigeyga, sidaas darteed casharka xiga ayaan dib u eegi karaa.

positiveExamples.english: She has completed the course and received her mock certificate.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxay dhammaystirtay koorsada, waxayna heshay shahaadadeeda tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan koorsadan A2 ku barannay saddex unit.

positiveExamples.somali: Akhris maalinle ah ayaa hagaajiyay erayadiisa English-ka.

positiveExamples.somali: Ma dhammaystirin layliga, sidaas darteed weli ma gudbin karo.

positiveExamples.somali: Weli ma dhammaystirin mashruuca sayniska.

positiveExamples.somali: Weli ma helin natiijooyinkooda imtixaanka.

positiveExamples.somali: Intii casharku socday, ardaygu wuxuu weydiiyay, “ma dhammaysay?”

negativeExamples.english: I haven’t finished the assignment yet.
negativeExamples.somali: Weli ma dhammaystirin layliga.

negativeExamples.english: She could not use the online classroom last year.
negativeExamples.somali: Sannadkii hore ma isticmaali karin fasalka online-ka.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hordhaca Present Perfect: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I have finished my homework, so I can review the next lesson.
lines.somali: Waxaan dhammaystiray shaqo-gurigeyga, sidaas darteed casharka xiga ayaan dib u eegi karaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hordhaca Present Perfect: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: She has completed the course and received her mock certificate.
lines.somali: Waxay dhammaystirtay koorsada, waxayna heshay shahaadadeeda tusaalaha ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee teacher–student role-play ku saabsan Hordhaca Present Perfect. Isticmaal arday, koorso iyo jadwal tusaale ah; ha bixin xog dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama education message ku saabsan Hordhaca Present Perfect, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mock ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Hordhaca Present Perfect, vocabulary muhiim ah, grammar-ka A2 iyo sida education context loogu isticmaalo.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qaabka saddexaad ee falalka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples waxbarasho oo dabiici ah, iyo mock education data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Qaabka saddexaad ee falalka.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Past participle wuxuu la socdaa have/has; Past Simple wuxuu sharxaa dhacdo waqti hore oo dhammaaday. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Past participle wuxuu la socdaa have/has; Past Simple wuxuu sharxaa dhacdo waqti hore oo dhammaaday.
grammar.sentenceStructure: have/has + past participle; irregular forms must be learned.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qaabka saddexaad ee falalka: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The verb table shows “Finish – finished – finished,” and the learner has used finish in a sentence.
lines.somali: Jadwalka falku wuxuu muujinayaa “dhammaystir,” ardayguna qaabka saddexaad ayuu jumlad ku isticmaalay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qaabka saddexaad ee falalka: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The verb table shows “Complete – completed – completed,” and the learner has used complete in a sentence.
lines.somali: Jadwalka falku wuxuu muujinayaa “dhammaystir,” ardayguna qaabka saddexaad ayuu jumlad ku isticmaalay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Ever badanaa wuxuu ku jiraa su’aalaha experience; never wuxuu durba leeyahay macne negative. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Ever badanaa wuxuu ku jiraa su’aalaha experience; never wuxuu durba leeyahay macne negative.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Have/Has + subject + ever + participle? / subject + have/has + never + participle.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Isticmaalka Already, Yet iyo Just
grammar.explanationSomali: Already badanaa wuxuu dhexgalaa have iyo participle; yet wuxuu yimaadaa dhammaadka question/negative; just wuxuu dhexgalaa have iyo participle. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Already badanaa wuxuu dhexgalaa have iyo participle; yet wuxuu yimaadaa dhammaadka question/negative; just wuxuu dhexgalaa have iyo participle.
grammar.sentenceStructure: have/has + already/just + participle; have/has not + participle + yet.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

grammar.titleEnglish: Past Simple and Present Perfect grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Farqiga Past Simple iyo Present Perfect
grammar.explanationSomali: Past Simple wuxuu leeyahay waqti hore oo dhammaaday; Present Perfect wuxuu la xiriiraa hadda iyadoo aan waqti dhammaaday la sheegin. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Past Simple wuxuu leeyahay waqti hore oo dhammaaday; Present Perfect wuxuu la xiriiraa hadda iyadoo aan waqti dhammaaday la sheegin.
grammar.sentenceStructure: past verb + finished time / have/has + participle + current relevance.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isticmaalka For iyo Since waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples waxbarasho oo dabiici ah, iyo mock education data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Isticmaalka For iyo Since.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: For + duration; since + starting point. Present Perfect Continuous laguma darayo. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: For + duration; since + starting point. Present Perfect Continuous laguma darayo.
grammar.sentenceStructure: have/has + participle + for duration / since starting point.

grammar.explanationSomali: Timetable-ku wuxuu isku daraa day, subject, time, teacher, room, break iyo due date. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Timetable-ku wuxuu isku daraa day, subject, time, teacher, room, break iyo due date.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + starts/finishes + at time; lasts + duration.

positiveExamples.english: The timetable shows that English starts at eight on Monday.
positiveExamples.somali: Jadwalku wuxuu muujinayaa in English-ku bilaabmo siddeedda Isniinta.

negativeExamples.english: She could not use the online classroom last year.
negativeExamples.somali: Sannadkii hore ma isticmaali karin fasalka online-ka.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Jadwallada waxbarashada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The timetable shows that English starts at eight on Monday.
lines.somali: Jadwalku wuxuu muujinayaa in English-ku bilaabmo siddeedda Isniinta.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Jadwallada waxbarashada: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The course timetable clearly shows the day for each example lesson.
lines.somali: Jadwalka koorsadu wuxuu si cad u muujinayaa maalin cashar kasta oo tusaale ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ogeysiisyada school-ka iyo koorsooyinka: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: A notice beside the classroom door says, “Class cancelled.”
lines.somali: Ogeysiis yaal albaabka fasalka ayaa leh, “cashar la baajiyay.”

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ogeysiisyada school-ka iyo koorsooyinka: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: A notice beside the classroom door says, “Room changed.”
lines.somali: Ogeysiis yaal albaabka fasalka ayaa leh, “qol la beddelay.”

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Course card-ku wuxuu bixiyaa title, level, dates, content, fee, requirement iyo mock registration. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Course card-ku wuxuu bixiyaa title, level, dates, content, fee, requirement iyo mock registration.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

examples.english: BEGINNER COMPUTER COURSE — A2 entry level — starts 3 August 2026 — four weeks — Sunday and Tuesday, 17:00–18:30 — Example Training Centre — files, email, and basic documents — mock fee $20 — basic reading required — register with a mock form.
examples.somali: KOORSADA KOMBIYUUTARKA BILOWGA — heer gelitaan A2 — bilaabmaysa 3 Agoosto 2026 — afar toddobaad — Axad iyo Talaado 17:00–18:30 — Xarun Tababar Tusaale ah — faylal, iimayl iyo dukumentiyo aasaasi ah — khidmad tusaale $20 — akhris aasaasi ah ayaa loo baahan yahay — ku diiwaangeli foom tusaale ah.

examples.english: ENGLISH EVENING COURSE — elementary — starts 5 August 2026 — six weeks — Monday and Wednesday, 18:00–19:30 — Example Language Centre — speaking, listening, reading, and writing — mock fee $25 — A1 completion — register in the mock classroom.
examples.somali: KOORSADA ENGLISH-KA FIIDKII — elementary — bilaabmaysa 5 Agoosto 2026 — lix toddobaad — Isniin iyo Arbaco 18:00–19:30 — Xarun Luqadeed Tusaale ah — hadal, dhagaysi, akhris iyo qoraal — khidmad tusaale $25 — A1 la dhammaystiray — iska diiwaangeli fasalka tusaalaha ah.

examples.english: BUSINESS-SKILLS TRAINING — elementary — starts 9 August 2026 — three weeks — Thursday, 16:00–18:00 — Example College Room D2 — customer messages and simple records — mock fee $15 — no experience required — submit a mock registration card.
examples.somali: TABABARKA XIRFADAHA GANACSIGA — elementary — bilaabmaya 9 Agoosto 2026 — saddex toddobaad — Khamiis 16:00–18:00 — Kulliyad Tusaale Qolka D2 — fariimaha macaamiisha iyo diiwaanno fudud — khidmad tusaale $15 — waayo-aragnimo looma baahna — gudbi kaar diiwaangelin tusaale ah.

examples.english: WRITING COURSE — A2 — starts 12 August 2026 — five weeks — Saturday, 09:00–11:00 — Example Library Classroom — paragraphs, messages, and short reports — mock fee $18 — able to write simple sentences — register using a mock application.
examples.somali: KOORSADA QORAALKA — A2 — bilaabmaysa 12 Agoosto 2026 — shan toddobaad — Sabti 09:00–11:00 — Fasalka Maktabad Tusaale ah — paragraph-yo, fariimo iyo warbixinno gaagaaban — khidmad tusaale $18 — awoodda jumlado fudud — ku diiwaangeli codsi tusaale ah.

examples.english: ONLINE LANGUAGE COURSE — elementary — starts 15 August 2026 — eight weeks — Sunday, Tuesday, and Thursday, 19:00–19:45 — online mock classroom — vocabulary, pronunciation, and conversations — mock fee $12 — internet access required — choose the mock register button.
examples.somali: KOORSADA LUQADDA ONLINE — elementary — bilaabmaysa 15 Agoosto 2026 — siddeed toddobaad — Axad, Talaado iyo Khamiis 19:00–19:45 — fasal online tusaale ah — erayo, dhawaaq iyo wada sheekeysi — khidmad tusaale $12 — internet ayaa loo baahan yahay — dooro badhanka diiwaangelinta tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Fahamka macluumaadka koorsada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The mock course card clearly lists the course title for interested learners.
lines.somali: Kaarka koorsada tusaalaha ahi wuxuu si cad u qoraa magaca koorsada ardayda danaynaysa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Fahamka macluumaadka koorsada: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The mock course card clearly lists the level for interested learners.
lines.somali: Kaarka koorsada tusaalaha ahi wuxuu si cad u qoraa heer ardayda danaynaysa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Study plan wanaagsan wuxuu leeyahay hadaf macquul ah, wakhti, hawl, nasasho iyo progress check. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Study plan wanaagsan wuxuu leeyahay hadaf macquul ah, wakhti, hawl, nasasho iyo progress check.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

examples.english: My goal is to improve my English speaking. I am going to practise for twenty minutes from Sunday to Thursday. On Sunday and Tuesday, I will listen to short conversations. On Monday and Wednesday, I will practise speaking. On Thursday, I will review the new vocabulary and check my progress.
examples.somali: Hadafkaygu waa inaan hagaajiyo ku hadalka English-ka. Waxaan tababaranayaa labaatan daqiiqo Axad ilaa Khamiis. Axad iyo Talaado waxaan dhagaysanayaa wada sheekeysi gaagaaban. Isniin iyo Arbaco waxaan tababaranayaa hadalka. Khamiis waxaan dib u eegayaa erayada cusub, horumarkaygana waan hubinayaa.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista qorshe waxbarasho: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The weekly study plan clearly lists learning goal for the example learner.
lines.somali: Qorshaha toddobaadlaha ahi wuxuu si cad u taxayaa hadaf waxbarasho ee ardayga tusaalaha ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista qorshe waxbarasho: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The weekly study plan clearly lists study days for the example learner.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

lessons.titleEnglish: Writing a Message to a Teacher
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista fariin loo diro macallin waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples waxbarasho oo dabiici ah, iyo mock education data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Qorista fariin loo diro macallin.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Writing a Message to a Teacher grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Qorista fariin loo diro macallin
grammar.explanationSomali: Fariintu waxay leedahay greeting, reason, detail, clear request iyo polite ending; xogtu waa mock. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Fariintu waxay leedahay greeting, reason, detail, clear request iyo polite ending; xogtu waa mock.

positiveExamples.english: The message to the teacher includes a clear greeting before the polite ending.
positiveExamples.somali: Fariinta macallinka loo diro waxay leedahay salaan cad ka hor gunaanadka edebta leh.

positiveExamples.english: The message to the teacher includes a clear reason before the polite ending.
positiveExamples.somali: Fariinta macallinka loo diro waxay leedahay sabab cad ka hor gunaanadka edebta leh.

positiveExamples.english: The message to the teacher includes a clear important detail before the polite ending.
positiveExamples.somali: Fariinta macallinka loo diro waxay leedahay faahfaahin muhiim ah cad ka hor gunaanadka edebta leh.

positiveExamples.english: The message to the teacher includes a clear clear request before the polite ending.
positiveExamples.somali: Fariinta macallinka loo diro waxay leedahay codsi cad cad ka hor gunaanadka edebta leh.

positiveExamples.english: The message to the teacher includes a clear polite ending before the polite ending.
positiveExamples.somali: Fariinta macallinka loo diro waxay leedahay gunaanad edeb leh cad ka hor gunaanadka edebta leh.

positiveExamples.english: The student writes to ask for clarification in a polite message to the example teacher.
positiveExamples.somali: Ardaygu wuxuu qoraa inuu sharaxaad dheeraad ah codso isagoo fariin edeb leh u diraya macallinka tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: The student writes to report an absence in a polite message to the example teacher.
positiveExamples.somali: Ardaygu wuxuu qoraa inuu maqnaansho soo sheeg isagoo fariin edeb leh u diraya macallinka tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: The student writes to ask about homework in a polite message to the example teacher.
positiveExamples.somali: Ardaygu wuxuu qoraa inuu shaqo-guri wax ka weydii isagoo fariin edeb leh u diraya macallinka tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: I haven’t finished the assignment yet.
negativeExamples.somali: Weli ma dhammaystirin layliga.

negativeExamples.english: She could not use the online classroom last year.
negativeExamples.somali: Sannadkii hore ma isticmaali karin fasalka online-ka.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista fariin loo diro macallin: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The message to the teacher includes a clear greeting before the polite ending.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista fariin loo diro macallin: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The message to the teacher includes a clear reason before the polite ending.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Progress paragraph-ku wuxuu isku daraa Past Simple, Present Perfect, ability, difficulty, practice iyo next goal. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Progress paragraph-ku wuxuu isku daraa Past Simple, Present Perfect, ability, difficulty, practice iyo next goal.
grammar.sentenceStructure: past start + present result + current difficulty + next goal.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

examples.english: The progress paragraph says, “Haven’t practised enough yet.” and adds a specific learning detail.
examples.somali: Paragraph-ka horumarku wuxuu leeyahay, “weli si ku filan uma tababaran.” wuxuuna ku daraa faahfaahin waxbarasho oo cad.

examples.english: I started studying English six months ago at an example language centre. During the first month, I learned basic greetings, numbers, and simple classroom phrases. I have now completed the A1 level and several A2 units. I can understand short conversations, read course notices, and write simple messages to a teacher. Listening is still difficult when people speak quickly, so I practise with short recordings every evening. I have already learned many useful phrases, but I haven’t practised speaking enough yet. Last week, I joined a small study group and spoke English for ten minutes. That activity helped me feel more confident. I also use flashcards and review my mistakes after every quiz. My next goal is to speak for fifteen minutes without changing to Somali. I am going to follow a realistic weekly study plan and ask my tutor for feedback.
examples.somali: Waxaan English bilaabay lix bilood kahor xarun luqadeed tusaale ah. Waxaan hadda dhammaystiray A1 iyo dhowr unit oo A2 ah. Waan fahmi karaa wada sheekeysi gaaban, ogeysiisyo koorso, waxaanan qori karaa fariimo fudud. Dhagaysigu weli wuu igu adag yahay marka si degdeg ah loo hadlo, sidaas darteed fiid kasta ayaan ku tababartaa duubisyo gaagaaban. Waxaan hore u bartay weedho badan, laakiin weli hadalka si ku filan uguma tababaran. Hadafkayga xiga waa inaan shan iyo toban daqiiqo English ku hadlo.

Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.

Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

examples.english: Her English progress improved after she began practising for twenty minutes every day.
examples.somali: Horumarkeeda English-ku wuu fiicnaaday markii ay bilowday inay maalin kasta labaatan daqiiqo tababarto.

examples.english: Understanding fast conversations is still a challenge for the example learner.
examples.somali: Fahamka wada sheekeysiyada degdegga ahi weli waa caqabad ardayga tusaalaha ah.

examples.english: The reader identifies the sequence in Sahra’s online-course story.
examples.somali: Akhristuhu wuxuu isku xigxig ka gartaa sheekada koorsada online-ka ee Sahra.

examples.english:
When Sahra joined an online English course three months ago, she was worried about studying from home. She had never used an online classroom, and she could not find the lesson files on her first day. Her tutor showed her where to open the weekly timetable and how to submit each assignment.

Sahra then made a simple study plan. On Sunday and Tuesday, she watched the recorded lesson and took notes. On Monday and Wednesday, she revised vocabulary with flashcards for twenty minutes. She kept Thursday for speaking practice with a study partner. She also turned off phone notifications so that she could concentrate.

Last month, Sahra took her first online test and received sixty-eight percent. She did not pass, but the tutor’s feedback helped her understand her mistakes. Since then, she has completed every homework task on time and has already retaken the test. Her new score is seventy-eight percent.

Listening is still challenging for Sahra, especially when speakers talk quickly. However, she can now understand the main idea of short recordings. She has just started using slower recordings before listening at normal speed. Her next goal is to ask more questions during live lessons. She has learned that steady practice and useful feedback can turn a difficult beginning into clear progress.
examples.somali: Sahra waxay saddex bilood kahor ku biirtay koorso English online ah. Bilowgii ma aqoon sida faylasha loo helo, laakiin macallinka taageerada ayaa caawiyay. Waxay samaysatay qorshe fudud, erayadana way dib u eegtaa, hadalkana saaxiib waxbarasho ayay kula tababartaa. Imtixaankeedii koowaad waxay heshay 68%, laakiin jawaab-celinta kadib way ku celisay oo waxay heshay 78%. Dhagaysigu weli wuu adag yahay, balse horumar cad ayay samaysay.

dialogues.titleSomali: asking for classroom help • vocabulary notes • grammar note • comprehension • missing-line • best-response • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Hello. Do you have a moment to study together?
lines.somali: Salaan. Waqti yar ma haysaa inaan wada baranno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, of course. Which topic are you reviewing?
lines.somali: Haa, dabcan. Mowduucee dib u eegaysaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I don’t understand question four. Could you explain it again?
lines.somali: Ma fahmin su’aasha afraad. Mar kale ma sharxi kartaa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you for explaining the situation clearly.
lines.somali: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad xaaladda si cad u sharaxday.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you studied this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u baratay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I haven’t completed all the exercises yet.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin weli ma dhammaystirin layliyada oo dhan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could we check the first example together?
lines.somali: Tusaalaha koowaad ma wada hubin karnaa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I have already opened the workbook.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Waxaan hore u furay buugga shaqada.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: This explanation is clearer than the last one.
lines.somali: Sharaxaaddani way ka caddahay tii hore.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Good. Let us write one new sentence each.
lines.somali: Wanaagsan. Aan qof walba qorno hal jumlad oo cusub.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I will review my sentence before I submit it.
lines.somali: Waxaan dib u eegi doonaa jumladayda ka hor inta aanan gudbin.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Great. We can ask the tutor for feedback later.
lines.somali: Fiican. Goor dambe waxaan macallinka taageerada ka codsan karnaa jawaab-celin.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa homework, exam collocations, explain to, participles, tense markers iyo prepositions. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa homework, exam collocations, explain to, participles, tense markers iyo prepositions.
grammar.sentenceStructure: choose the natural education form required by context.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: We have a lot of homework, but the tasks are short.
lines.somali: Waxaan haynaa shaqo-guri badan, laakiin hawluhu waa gaagaaban yihiin.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The teacher gave us three homework tasks for this week.
lines.somali: Macallinku wuxuu toddobaadkan na siiyay saddex hawlood oo shaqo-guri ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.

grammar.explanationSomali: Review-gu wuxuu isku daraa dhammaan mawduucyada Unit 7. Sharaxaaddani waa A2; Present Perfect Continuous iyo isticmaal ka sarreeya heerkan laguma darin.
grammar.rule: Review-gu wuxuu isku daraa dhammaan mawduucyada Unit 7.

commonMistakesSomali: Present Perfect wuxuu u baahan yahay have/has + past participle.
Finished time sida yesterday ama last week badanaa wuxuu qaataa Past Simple.
For wuxuu la socdaa duration; since wuxuu la socdaa starting point.
Never durba waa negative; ha ku darin haven’t never.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 7: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you help me with today’s lesson?
lines.somali: Ma iga caawin kartaa casharka maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The Unit 7 review connects education places to a practical study task.
lines.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 7 waxay goobaha waxbarashada ku xiraysaa hawl waxbarasho oo wax-ku-ool ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Have you reviewed this topic before?
lines.somali: Mowduucan hore ma u soo eegtay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but I need another clear example.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin tusaale kale oo cad ayaan u baahanahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 7: wada hadal labaad • grammar • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The Unit 7 review connects education people to a practical study task.
lines.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 7 waxay dadka waxbarashada ku xiraysaa hawl waxbarasho oo wax-ku-ool ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will add that to my study plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan taas ku darayaa qorshahayga waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask if the instructions are unclear.
lines.somali: Fadlan weydii haddii tilmaamuhu caddayn waayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I will. I have already written one question.
lines.somali: Waan weydiinayaa. Waxaan hore u qoray hal su’aal.
